Alko Oy Keskusvarasto.reason: Major distributor with 165+ days overdue; large balance (€18.5K) requires strict net-45 terms with prepayment verification.

Kesko Oyj Päivittäistavarakauppa.reason: 10 days overdue on €3.3K; large retailer chain should pay net-30 with escalation protocol.

My Dear Beer B.V..reason: 57 days overdue on €9.6K export invoice; EU customer likely caught in logistics; recommend net-35 with deposit.

OlutSatama (Ideaosuuskunta Aito).reason: 281 days overdue on €5.9K; cooperative structure suggests chronic cash flow; switch to net-50 COD or prepay.

Own Channels (Espoo Shop, Online, Own Ba.reason: Highest priority; internal channels must remain 3-5 day DSO to support fixed €62.8K/month obligations.

alerts.message: Escalate immediately: €18.5K overdue 165 days (invoice #4460, due 2025-10-30). Contact legal/credit department; if no commitment to payment plan by 2026-04-15, file demand notice. This represents 15% of total overdue AR.
Contact customer today with formal payment demand for €9.6K (invoice #5151, 57 days overdue). Verify customs/logistics delays; if not cleared, initiate chargeback or escalate to trade credit insurer.
€5.9K outstanding 281 days (invoice #3837, due 2025-07-05). Likely uncollectible; escalate to collections or write-off review by 2026-04-20. Do not extend further credit.

Open AR €120.6K across 75 invoices + €82.2K overdue across 65 invoices = €202.8K total AR equals 101% of April budget revenue. With 62% YoY growth, working capital is stretched. Prioritize collection of top 5 overdue (€41.4K) before month-end.
Invoice #14 is 607 days overdue (€4.5K, due 2024-08-14). Assume uncollectible and initiate write-off process; likely no contact/dissolved entity.
Recent 30-day sales (€39.4K) are 19.5% of April budget (€201.9K), suggesting sales pipeline tracking below forecast. Verify April revenue will hit budget to maintain €62.8K fixed cost coverage.
44 open POs (€80K) + 101 internal stock lines indicate healthy production capacity. Ensure €80K payment schedule aligns with incoming export cash (6-8 weeks post-August peak); build cash buffer now.

insights.weekly_cash_risk: €82.2K overdue AR (41% of open balance) with €18.5K + €9.6K concentrated in two customers represents immediate liquidity risk if collections fail; combined with €62.8K fixed monthly costs and sub-target April sales (€39.4K last 30 days), cash coverage for May is at risk.
insights.top_action: Execute collection call blitz today (2026-04-13) targeting Alko Oy (€18.5K), My Dear Beer B.V. (€9.6K), and OlutSatama (€5.9K); demand written payment commitment by 2026-04-15 or escalate to legal/credit; simultaneously verify April revenue trajectory to confirm €201.9K forecast is on track.
pattern_insights: Large distributor/retailer segment (Alko, Kesko, OlutSatama) shows 165+ days overdue; indicates either systemic payment delays in Finnish retail distribution or contract disputes; recommend credit insurance or net-20 COD for future Alko orders.

Export customers (My Dear Beer B.V., Made in Poland Bcn, Wittich Weine) cluster at 10-57 days overdue; 6-8 week export DSO is being stretched; implement pre-shipment deposit (30-50%) for non-EU/high-risk export orders effective immediately.
insights.wc_note: At 62% YoY growth with €202.8K AR and only €39.4K recent sales velocity, working capital is critically extended; peak season cash (August €282K) arrives net 6-8 weeks, creating October liquidity crunch; Bemböle contract loss (€25K/mo Sept 2026) will worsen position unless overdue AR is recovered or credit terms tightened now.
